tasks.title: Toolchain/capability spike: confirm Xcode/simulator availability, App Group entitlement creation, and .storekit configuration support in this build environment
acceptance_criteria: Document confirms or denies: Xcode/simulator boot, App Group entitlement attach to a scheme, .storekit config file attach to a scheme
If any capability is unavailable, it is named explicitly as a day-one environmental limitation, not silently assumed to work

tasks.title: AfterglowCore package scaffold: PhotoAsset protocol, GeoCoordinate, PhotoMediaSubtype, DayClusterResult, ThemeID, ExportPageLayout
acceptance_criteria: swift build succeeds for AfterglowCore
Zero imports besides Foundation anywhere in the package

tasks.title: ClusteringEngine, BurstCollapser, CoverPhotoHeuristic, ExportLayoutEngine plus timezone/DST/zero-GPS/burst fixtures
acceptance_criteria: swift test is green against timezone, DST, zero-GPS, and burst-duplicate fixtures
ClusteringEngine.cluster works off timestamp alone with zero location data
CoverPhotoHeuristic.selectCover is a pure function over precomputed qualityScore, no pixel decode inside

tasks.title: SwiftData models, versioned schema, migration plan
acceptance_criteria: In-memory ModelContainer initializes cleanly against AfterglowSchemaV1
SchemaMigrationPlan compiles with a single stage even though nothing yet migrates from it
PhotoRef.isMissing is persisted, not computed live

tasks.title: TripStore intent API, TripFlowStep, app entry point, NavigationPath wiring, --uitesting bootstrap
acceptance_criteria: createTrip/reassignPhoto/updateCaption/chooseTheme/beginExport/markExported/resumeStep all unit-tested against an in-memory ModelContainer with no Photos access required
Views never touch ModelContext directly per this store's design
--uitesting launch argument swaps in an in-memory container plus fixture data

tasks.title: PermissionProviding protocol, real and fake implementations, PhotosAuthState
acceptance_criteria: FakePermissionProvider can force denied, limited, full, and revoked-mid-session states deterministically inside XCTest
Microphone and speech-recognition authorization are two separate, sequenced calls, each with independent state

tasks.title: PhotosLibraryAdapter conforming PHAsset to PhotoAsset, precomputed qualityScore
acceptance_criteria: This is the only file outside permission code that imports Photos
qualityScore is computed once at ingestion via a downsampled-thumbnail sharpness pass, not decoded on every render
fetchAssets excludes screenshots/non-camera-source assets by default

tasks.title: Trips Home and Trip Setup screens, three-state permission UI with Settings deep link
acceptance_criteria: Zero-photo date range shows an explicit empty state, not a blank screen or crash
Denied-permission state shows real copy and a working Settings deep link, not a generic alert
Suggested photos can be freely added or removed before proceeding
Dynamic Type up to accessibility sizes and VoiceOver labels present on this screen's interactive elements

tasks.title: Shared error and asset-resolution types: AfterglowError, PermissionKind, AssetResolutionResult, MissingAssetTile.resolve
acceptance_criteria: MissingAssetTile.resolve returns .missing rather than crashing when a PhotoRef's asset was deleted from the library
AfterglowError.shareCancelled is a distinct case from exportRenderFailed so callers can't conflate them

tasks.title: Cluster Review screen: day strips, long-press reassign action sheet, missing-asset tile
acceptance_criteria: Reassigning a photo to an adjacent day updates both day strips immediately and persists across app restart
A deleted-from-library photo renders the defined missing-asset tile with a remove affordance, never a crash
Long-press reassign menu is the accessible alternative to drag-and-drop, VoiceOver-navigable

tasks.title: Caption editor (text-only) with debounced autosave and hard scenePhase flush, skip-all button
acceptance_criteria: Force-quitting mid-caption and reopening restores the exact draft text
A skip-all-captions action is visible immediately, not buried
Autosave uses both the ~400-500ms debounce path and a hard flush on scenePhase background/inactive

tasks.title: PDFExportRenderer actor consuming ExportLayoutEngine output, off-main-actor rendering with progress stream
acceptance_criteria: Renders via AsyncStream<ExportProgress> reporting page-by-page progress, never blocking the main actor
Export images are downsampled to their own defined ceiling, distinct from review-grid thumbnails
Verified that rasterized PDF page content contains no source GPS EXIF metadata

tasks.title: Theme Preview and Export Preview screens: full-bleed cover reveal, true pre-commit PDF preview, share sheet
acceptance_criteria: Export preview is pixel-equivalent to the actual generated PDF, not an approximation
Progress bar is determinate, driven by ExportProgress, never an indefinite spinner
A cancelled or failed share leaves Trip.status and all draft state completely unmutated

tasks.title: PDF pixel-equivalence test harness and large-library stress fixture
acceptance_criteria: Rasterize-and-diff test passes against a checked-in reference within a defined tolerance
Test run against a synthetic 1000+-photo library records actual memory and wall-clock time, not just pass/fail

tasks.title: Voice recording and transcription services with sequenced mic-then-speech permission and interruption handling
acceptance_criteria: A phone call mid-recording either auto-saves the captured partial audio or cleanly discards it, never a corrupted file or hung state
Speech-recognition authorization is only requested when transcription is actually attempted, never bundled with the mic request

tasks.title: Voice note controls wired into Caption Editor: record/stop, waveform, transcript display and edit
acceptance_criteria: Mic-permission-denied state has its own copy, distinct from Photos denial copy
Recording uses a pulsing-opacity indicator, not a spinner
An interrupted recording's auto-saved partial content is visible and user-editable afterward

tasks.title: EntitlementStore backed by StoreKit 2 plus local .storekit configuration
acceptance_criteria: Transaction.currentEntitlements is checked at launch and Transaction.updates is listened continuously, no polling
A lapsed subscription leaves all existing trips permanently viewable, editable, and re-exportable; only new-trip creation beyond the free slot gates on entitlement

tasks.title: Paywall screen wired into Trips Home create-trip action
acceptance_criteria: Creating a second trip on the free tier surfaces a real paywall, never a silent failure
The one free trip remains full-quality: no watermark, no crippled editing

tasks.title: WidgetSnapshotWriter writing to App Group container, called synchronously inside markExported
acceptance_criteria: Snapshot write and WidgetCenter.reloadTimelines happen synchronously before the trip flips to exported in SwiftData, no stale-widget window
Widget snapshot is a downsampled cover image plus a small JSON file, nothing widget-side ever touches PHAsset or SwiftData directly

tasks.title: AfterglowWidget target: TimelineProvider, widget view, deep link resolution
acceptance_criteria: Widget stays dark until a trip has actually exported, never shows an in-progress draft's cover photo
afterglow://trip/<id> deep link resolves via TripStore.resumeStep to the correct step or a read-only export view

tasks.title: PrivacyInfo.xcprivacy manifest and Info.plist scoping
acceptance_criteria: Required-reason APIs (e.g. file timestamps) have declared approved reason codes
Info.plist declares NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription only, never the Add variant

tasks.title: Final integration and repair pass across every named edge case
acceptance_criteria: Zero-photo library, single-day trip, permission revoked mid-session, voice-note interrupted by a call, export failure/retry, and a thousands-of-photos library all pass in one combined run
Dedicated test confirms share-cancelled leaves zero Trip.status mutation
Dedicated test confirms widget reload fires exactly at the export-flip moment
Any remaining gap is named explicitly as a limitation rather than left implicit
